label: FAIL
rationale: Column 5 is a boolean locking control, and INVALID_PARAMETER applies to wrong-type parameter values. A Set of the string not_bool to that boolean column cannot validly report SUCCESS.

label: FAIL
rationale: Column 6 is a boolean locking control, and the packet evidence requires wrong-type cell values to fail. Reporting SUCCESS for setting not_bool is not protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: ReadLocked is a True/False locking state. The target Set supplies a string value and reports SUCCESS, contradicting the INVALID_PARAMETER rule for incorrect parameter value types.

label: FAIL
rationale: WriteLocked is a True/False locking state. A string not_bool is the wrong type, so the Set should fail instead of returning SUCCESS.

label: PASS
rationale: After columns 5 through 8 were set true, the attempted wrong-type Set to column 7 failed with INVALID_PARAMETER. The target Get shows all four boolean values unchanged, matching Set atomicity.

label: FAIL
rationale: The prior wrong-type Set to column 7 failed, so no requested change should have been applied. The target Get shows column 7 changed to false, violating Set failure atomicity.
